candidates.why: Primary line that clearly represents core operating revenue; higher and more comprehensive than 'Other operating revenues', which is ancillary.
'Other operating revenues' is a supplemental revenue line and could be needed for years where main revenue label might be missing, so kept as secondary priority.
This is a classic cost of goods sold / cost of sales line in the income statement, directly tied to production/service costs.
'Raw Materials' is an inventory component on the balance sheet, not an expense; therefore not appropriate for COGS.
'Other operating revenues' is income, not an operating expense, so it should NOT be included as SG&A.
Explicit SG&A component; stock-based compensation within SG&A is a classic overhead item and should be included.
Aggregated operating overhead bucket excluding COGS; suitable when no single explicit SG&A total line is provided.
Represents other operating overhead costs; fits SG&A-type expenses and is not a total/subtotal.

variables.notes: Excluded 'Other operating revenues' because it is revenue, not an expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not the current-period R&D expense itself; kept as secondary fallback.
Explicitly labeled current-period R&D expense on the income statement; best match for R&D expense.
Balance sheet capitalized R&D asset, not a period expense; not appropriate for XRD.
Accumulated amortization of capitalized R&D on the balance sheet; not the current-period expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

candidates.why: Primary income-statement line for interest expense; best representation of financing cost.
Represents profit attributable to non-controlling interests, not interest on debt; not suitable for XINT.
Net income portion for minorities, not an interest expense line.
Part of comprehensive income allocation, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; valid form of interest expense and a good secondary fallback if main interest line missing for some years.
Debt balance sheet item, not an expense; not appropriate for XINT.
Equity attributable to minorities, not an interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interests; equity, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

candidates.why: Represents equity attributable to owners of the parent (shareholders' equity), which matches the book equity definition; preferred over total equity including minorities.
Total equity including non-controlling interests; kept as secondary fallback in case 'Group equity' is missing for some years.
Represents total assets/liabilities balancing figure, not pure equity; inappropriate for BE.
Income statement allocation to non-controlling interests; good for minority result but BE definition of MIB typically uses balance-sheet equity amount, so this is secondary.
Appears to be the same income-statement allocation to minorities; again more about profit share than equity balance.
Comprehensive income portion for minorities; income flow, not balance-sheet minority interest; lower priority.
Balance sheet line showing equity attributable to non-controlling interests; best match for minority interest in book equity context.
Alternative label for the same balance sheet minority equity; good secondary fallback over time.
